title: Optimization Model for Multi-Products and Multi-Suppliers Raw-Material Selection
author: Fadhli, Uttunggadewa, et al.
materials: one-month minimum delivery of raw materials
one-year minimum purchase of each raw material

steps.title: Method validation
steps.instruction: In this section, we give an example of the solution of the optimization model we derived in the previous section. In this example, we consider an instant where N = 6 and I = 51, so that we have 2508 decision variables.
